High Bluff Academy Summer Course Schedule

Live Group classes starting June 8 2026

Join us at our beautiful school in Rancho Santa Fe for in-person small group classes! 

Students have the option to attend virtually as needed.

On-Demand Online Classes

If you do not see the course that you are interested in taking, please call us. Any course can be offered online through our virtual remote learning platform or taken one-on-one with one of our in-person teachers. Visit our online high school page for more information. 

Online Course List and Pricing 

*High Bluff Academy is an official College Board testing site, offering students a seamless and convenient pathway to take their AP exams. By enrolling in any of our AP courses—whether in-person or online—you are guaranteed a spot to sit for the AP exam.

*CEEB Code: 053036

Dates of Summer Classes:

  • Six-Week Courses: June 8 – July 24 (These are indicated with an asterisk)
  • Six-week courses are not in session between June 29-July 3
  • Seven-Week Courses: June 8 to July 24 (except July 3)
  • Eight-Week Courses: June 8 to July 31 (except July 3)
  • Sessions are Monday through Friday
  • For all math classes an unofficial transcript must be submitted along with the application. In some cases a placement test may be required.

Online, Hybrid and In-Person Options Available
